# Expense Budget Tracker

> Open-source expense and budget tracker with multi-currency support, budget planning, and financial dashboards.

## Pages

- [Expense Budget Tracker - Open Source Personal Finance](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/): Open-source expense and budget tracker with multi-currency support, financial dashboards, and agent-native onboarding for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.
- [Features](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/features/): Multi-currency tracking, budget planning, dashboards, agent onboarding, API access, self-hosting, and workspace isolation.
- [Pricing](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/pricing/): Free self-hosted deployment or managed cloud hosting. Open source, no feature gating.
- [Privacy Policy](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/privacy/): Privacy policy for Expense Budget Tracker.
- [Terms of Service](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/terms/): Terms of service for Expense Budget Tracker.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/docs/getting-started/): Sign up for the cloud version or set up your own instance in minutes.
- [AI Agent Setup](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/docs/agent-setup/): Share one discovery URL with Claude Code, Codex, or OpenClaw and let the agent connect itself.
- [Self-Hosting Guide](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/docs/self-hosting/): Run Expense Budget Tracker on your own server with Docker Compose and Postgres.
- [API Reference](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/docs/api/): SQL API with bearer token auth. Query your data from scripts, LLM agents, or dashboards.
- [Architecture](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/docs/architecture/): System overview, data model, multi-currency design, and auth model.

## Blog

- [AI Expense Tracker Setup for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/blog/ai-agent-expense-tracker-claude-code-codex-openclaw/): How to connect Claude Code, Codex, or OpenClaw to an open-source expense tracker. Share one discovery URL, confirm the email code, and let the agent provision its own ApiKey and start working.
- [Mint Alternative in 2026: Open-Source Budget Tracker You Can Self-Host](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/blog/mint-alternative-open-source-budget-tracker-you-can-self-host/): Looking for a Mint alternative in 2026? Here is the practical tradeoff: most apps optimize for convenience, while an open-source budget tracker gives you self-hosting, AI workflows, SQL access, and full control over your data.
- [How to Manage a Personal Budget with Expense Categories](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/blog/how-to-manage-personal-budget-with-expense-categories/): A practical guide to personal budgeting — categorize every transaction, plan 12 months ahead, and use AI to skip the manual work.
- [How to Track Expenses and Manage Your Budget with Claude Code](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/blog/how-to-track-expenses-and-manage-your-budget-with-claude-code/): Set up Claude Code as your personal finance assistant. Give it a SQL API key to your expense tracker, and it will parse bank statements, categorize transactions, check balances, and manage your budget — all from the terminal.
- [How to Use AI to Track Expenses and Manage Your Budget](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/blog/how-to-use-ai-to-track-expenses-and-manage-your-budget/): A practical guide to AI-powered personal finance. Give your AI agent an API key, and it will parse bank statements, categorize transactions, track expenses, and manage your budget — all through a SQL API.
- [Self-Hosted Open Source Budget Tracker for Developers — Own Your Financial Data](https://expense-budget-tracker.com/blog/self-hosted-open-source-budget-tracker-for-developers/): Why programmers should self-host their expense tracker on their own server. Deploy an open-source budget tracker with SQL API, AI agent integration, and full control over your Postgres database.

## Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/kirill-markin/expense-budget-tracker)
- [Cloud App](https://app.expense-budget-tracker.com)

## Markdown Access

Any page on this site is available as clean Markdown for LLM consumption:
- Append `.md` to any URL (e.g. https://expense-budget-tracker.com/.md, https://expense-budget-tracker.com/features.md, https://expense-budget-tracker.com/docs/api.md)
- Or send the HTTP header `Accept: text/markdown` to get Markdown from the original URL
